card_types.description: Single dominant number or short phrase, very large, bold serif. Minimal supporting text below.
Eyebrow label + 3-4 short facts stacked. Clean sans-serif. Each fact is one line.
card_types.example: CARE ECONOMY label + bullet facts about state policy

card_types.description: Pillar perspective or expert quote. Serif italic, generous margins. Attribution below.
card_types.example: Caregiving is infrastructure. 63 million people do this work.

card_types.description: Short punchy phrase filling the frame. All-caps or large mixed-case. Alegreya bold.
Gemini-generated grounded fragment image. No text overlay. The image speaks alone.
card_types.example: Warm threshold fragment with single intervention

card_types.description: Gemini image as background with text overlay. Headline + eyebrow. Dark scrim if needed.

volume_range.accent_usage: minimal — thin rule or single word
bold — headline or full accent block

typography_rules.headline: Alegreya serif, bold weight. Warm, humanist, high-contrast. NOT geometric. NOT slab.
typography_rules.body: Inter, clean geometric sans-serif. Light weight, generous line-height. NOT serif for body.
typography_rules.display: Gabarito, bold uppercase wide tracking. For eyebrow labels and brand mark only.
typography_rules.hierarchy: Eyebrow (Gabarito small caps) → Headline (Alegreya large) → Body (Inter regular) → Brand mark (Gabarito)

composition_rules: 60/40 split — content occupies 60%, rest is negative space.
One dominant element per card. Everything else supports it.
Eyebrow label anchors the top. Brand mark anchors the bottom.
Accent color used structurally (rules, labels) not decoratively.

texture_and_background.direction: Agnes Martin-inspired. The negative space is not blank — it has presence.
qualities: Faint ruled pencil lines, barely visible, horizontal across the cream field
Subtle paper grain or canvas tooth — warm, tactile, not digital-smooth
Slight warmth variation across the surface, not perfectly uniform
The texture should feel like aged paper or raw gesso — quiet luminosity
avoid: Heavy textures that compete with typography
Geometric patterns, grids, or decorative marks
texture_and_background.reference: Agnes Martin 'Friendship' (1963), 'The Tree' (1964) — mathematical calm, pencil on canvas, barely-there structure

prompt_history.prompt:
`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
The hero-stat card type works best when the dominant number is treated as sculpture — the surrounding negative space isn't emptiness, it's pressure. The Agnes Martin texture direction is specific to this brand: barely-visible horizontal pencil lines give the cream field a mathematical calm that makes the bold serif stat feel grounded rather than floating.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

1200x1200 square social card. Pure typographic composition. No photography, no illustration, no icons, no decorative elements.

BACKGROUND: Warm cream #FDF9EC. Texture: faint horizontal pencil-ruled lines barely visible across the full surface, spaced approximately 24px apart, drawn in a slightly cooler tone (#E8E0C8), opacity around 8%. Slight paper grain and warmth variation — feels like aged gesso or raw linen, not a flat digital fill. No geometric patterns. No gradients.

LAYOUT: Left-aligned. Content occupies the left 60% of the

1200x1200 square social card. Pure typographic composition. No photography, no illustration, no icons, no decorative elements.

BACKGROUND: Warm cream #FDF9EC. Texture: faint horizontal pencil-ruled lines barely visible across the full surface, spaced approximately 24px apart, drawn in a slightly cooler tone (#E8E0C8), opacity around 8%. Slight paper grain and warmth variation — feels like aged gesso or raw linen, not a flat digital fill. No geometric patterns. No gradients.

LAYOUT: Left-aligned. Content occupies the left 60% of the frame. Right 40% is active negative space — do not fill it. Asymmetric vertical rhythm.

TOP ELEMENT — EYEBROW LABEL, top-left, approximately x:72px y:80px:
Text: "WEEK IN REVIEW"
Font: bold geometric sans-serif with wide uppercase tracking, similar to Gabarito. Small caps style. Letter-spacing very wide.
Size: approximately 18px
Color: #FF9F00
Below the eyebrow label: a thin horizontal rule, 2px height, color #FF9F00, width approximately 160px, positioned

```
★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────
Gemini image generation prompts work best as natural visual
descriptions, not CSS/layout specs. Pixel coordinates and
opacity values are DOM concepts — the model interprets intent,
not measurements. Verbose technical specs also increase the
chance the model falls back to text-only output.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

A square 1200×1200 typographic social card. Pure type composition — no photography, illustration, icons, or decorative elements.

Background: warm cream, like aged gesso or raw linen. Faint horizontal pencil-ruled lines barely visible across the surface at very low opacity. No gradients. No geometric patterns.

Layout: left-aligned, asymmetric. Content anchored to the left half. The right side is open negative space.

Top-left: small all-caps label "WEEK IN REVIEW" in bold wide-tracked geometric sans-serif, amber orange. A short thin orange rule sits beneath it.
